---
title: "Contact Me"
---

I am always open to discussing new projects and. Feel free to reach out to me via email or connect with me on my professional platforms!

<br>

<div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-3">
  <a href="mailto:aidanmistry17@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email Me
